name: roxabi-forge
description: Forge — HTML visual artifacts for Claude Code (diagrams, galleries, guides, epics)

scripts.gen-fd:check: python3 scripts/validate-descriptor.py --in plugins/forge/skills/forge-chart/fixtures/lyra-stack-v2.json --expect plugins/forge/skills/forge-chart/fixtures/lyra-stack-v2.expect.json && python3 scripts/gen-fd.py --in plugins/forge/skills/forge-chart/fixtures/lyra-stack-v2.json --out /tmp/lyra-stack-v2-gen.html --title 'Lyra · Architecture' && python3 scripts/validate-fd.py --html /tmp/lyra-stack-v2-gen.html --expect plugins/forge/skills/forge-chart/fixtures/lyra-stack-v2.expect.json
